concerns.text: Plan troubleshooting section references only 4 error codes (E-PAIRING, E-CHECKSUM, E-TIMEOUT, E-RETENTION) but data-model.md defines 8 validation rules. Missing: E-NEGATIVE, E-PATHWAY, E-CORRELATION, E-SIGNIFICANCE. Add these to plan troubleshooting for completeness.

Quickstart shows 3 pipeline phases (--phase download, --phase preprocess, --phase model) but plan.md defines 4 phases (Phase 1-4). Phase 4 (Orchestration/logging) is missing from quickstart commands. Add --phase log or integrate into main.py.

ModelArtifact schema uses nested objects (cross_validation, permutation_test) while data-model.md uses flat attributes (rmse_mean, rmse_std, pearson_r_mean, etc.). Align schema and data model attribute structure for consistency.
